home_description: A simple starting point for navigating the app while the product surface is still taking shape.
dashboard_description: Keep the important work in view and move to the next step from here.
sign_in_description: Use your account credentials to continue into the workspace.
auth_email_description: Use the email address tied to your account.
auth_password_description: Enter the password for this workspace account.
auth_name_description: Use the name that should appear inside the workspace.
auth_confirm_password_description: Re-enter the password to avoid typos.
auth_generic_error: We could not complete this request. Please try again.
sign_up_description: Start with a workspace-ready account and continue into the app.
auth_checking_description: Please wait while we verify your authentication state.
validation_organization_name_min: Organization name must be at least {count} characters.
validation_organization_name_max: Organization name must be at most {count} characters.
validation_organization_slug_min: Organization slug must be at least {count} characters.
validation_organization_slug_max: Organization slug must be at most {count} characters.
validation_organization_slug_pattern: Use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.
organization_list_generic_error: We could not load your organizations. Please try again.
organization_set_active_generic_error: We could not switch organizations. Please try again.
organization_create_description: Create the first organization workspace that the authenticated user can work inside.
organization_create_card_description: The organization name powers the display label, and the slug becomes the durable route-friendly identifier.
organization_create_name_description: This is the human-readable name that will appear in the app.
organization_create_slug_description: This becomes the URL-safe identifier. You can edit it before creating the organization.
organization_create_generic_error: We could not create this organization. Please try again.
